attractions.name: Hoi An Ancient Town
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage town with lantern-lined alleyways, merchant houses, and riverside cafés
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Hoai River Lantern Boat Ride
attractions.description: Traditional wooden boat ride with hundreds of lanterns illuminating the water. Includes flower lantern release

attractions.name: Hoi An Market
attractions.description: Lively central market with colors, spices, handmade lanterns, textiles, and local snacks

attractions.name: Phuc Kien Assembly Hall
attractions.description: Ornate Chinese assembly hall with elaborate architecture, incense coils, and dragon carvings

attractions.name: Japanese Covered Bridge
attractions.description: Historic bridge reflecting Japanese heritage and cultural fusion, iconic Hoi An landmark

attractions.name: Hoai River Boat Ride
attractions.description: Evening lantern boat ride experience with floating lanterns on the river

attractions.name: Cam Thanh Coconut Village
attractions.description: Lush network of water coconut palms where you can glide through narrow waterways in traditional basket boats

attractions.name: Fujian Assembly Hall
attractions.description: Historic Chinese temple with colorful gates, dragon statues, and intricately decorated rooftops

attractions.name: Assembly Halls
attractions.description: Multiple assembly halls: Cantonese, Chinese, Fujian with Phuc Kien Pagoda, Hainan, and Teochew

attractions.name: Thu Bon River Boat Trip
attractions.description: Evening boat trip on river illuminated by lanterns

attractions.name: Hoi An Central Market
attractions.description: Vibrant market with stalls selling clothes, gifts, jewellery, great for souvenirs shopping

attractions.name: Coconut Forest Bamboo Boat Ride
attractions.description: Bamboo boat ride through coconut forest

attractions.name: Japanese Covered Bridge Hoi An
attractions.description: Symbol of Hoi An's cultural fusion, beautifully preserved bridge with intricate carvings and a small temple within

attractions.name: Hoai River Hoi An
attractions.description: Gentle boat rides along the river with lantern reflections shimmering across the water, perfect for releasing flower lanterns

attractions.name: Hoi An Night Market
attractions.description: Lively market with color, music, and handcrafted treasures from silk lanterns to artisanal souvenirs

attractions.name: Tan Ky Ancient House
attractions.description: One of Hoi An's best-preserved merchant homes with intricate woodwork, antique furnishings, and blend of Vietnamese, Chinese, and Japanese influences

attractions.name: Tra Que Vegetable Village
attractions.description: Lush countryside where vibrant herbs and vegetables are grown using traditional organic methods

attractions.name: An Bang Beach
attractions.description: Soft sands, gentle waves, and beachside cafés perfect for unwinding under the sun

attractions.name: Phuc Kien Pagoda
attractions.description: Heritage temple in Hoi An Ancient Town

attractions.name: Riverside Lantern Market
attractions.description: Market in Hoi An Ancient Town

attractions.name: Thu Bon River
attractions.description: River for lantern boat rides around 7 PM

attractions.name: Cam Thanh Coconut Jungle
attractions.description: Peaceful green space with hands-on fishing experience and basket boat rowing

local_dishes.name: Cao Lầu (Veg)

local_dishes.name: Cơm Gà
local_dishes.description: Fragrant rice cooked in chicken stock, served with poached or roasted chicken

local_dishes.name: Ramie leaf cake (Banh it la gai)
local_dishes.description: Traditional cake made with ramie leaves

local_dishes.name: Cao Lầu
local_dishes.description: Unique noodle dish found only in Hoi An, combining chewy noodles, tender pork, fresh greens, and crispy croutons

local_dishes.name: White Rose Dumplings
local_dishes.description: Delicate steamed dumplings filled with shrimp or pork, topped with crispy garlic

local_dishes.name: Com Ga (Hoi An-style chicken rice)
local_dishes.description: Shredded chicken, herbs, and yellow rice

local_dishes.name: Grilled Pork Skewers with Rice Paper
local_dishes.description: DIY spring rolls with herbs and dipping sauces

safety_tips.tip: Avoid nighttime travel in remote or poorly lit areas, especially outside Hoi An or Son Tra
Avoid beaches after dark – avoid isolated areas
Be careful with motorbike traffic – always use pedestrian crossings carefully
Watch out for taxi meter rigging – Always use trusted apps like Grab for safe pricing
Be aware of currency confusion – VND has high denominations; double-check notes before handing over
Don't carry all your cash/cards in one place
Use hotel safes for passports and valuables
Be cautious at night markets; petty theft is rare but possible
Carry a copy of your passport when exploring
